features: RAPID RELIEF: Masterplast Freeze Gel provides instant relief from the pain of twists and sprains and bruises. Easy and ready to use, use the cold therapy gel for instant relief to your neck knee, ankle, elbow or back.

FAST ACTING: Rapid acting cold treatment will control swelling allowing the healing process to begin. The gel is easy to apply, ideal for the wrist, elbow or ankle, treating inflammation, swelling, bruising in an instant
INNOVATIVE: Specially formulated to provide the healing properties of cold therapy, quickly and instantly, ideal to keep in a gym, sports or football kit bag

READY TO USE: Easy to apply a direct burst of cooling relief to a specific area. The gel can be used immediately after exercise, in the event of a twist, sprain or damaged causing bruising. Apply as often as required. Wash hands after use. For external use only. Do not use on broken or irritated skin
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use 170ml tube
description: Product Description Masterplast Freeze Gel provides instant relief from the pain of twists and sprains and bruises. Easy and ready to use, use the cold therapy gel for instant relief to your neck, knee, ankle, elbow or back. Rapid acting cold treatment will control swelling allowing the healing process to begin. The gel is easy to apply, ideal for the wrist, elbow or ankle, treating inflammation, swelling, bruising in an instant. The gel can be used immediately after exercise, in the event of a twist, sprain or damaged causing bruising. Apply as often as required. Wash hands after use. For external use only. Do not use on broken or irritated skin. 170ml tube Directions 1. Apply the gel to the specific area of pain or inflammation. 2. Use as needed, even immediately after exercise or in case of sprains, strains or bruises. 3. Wash your hands after using. 4. For external use only. 5. Do not use on broken or irritated skin. Safety Warning For external use only. Do not use on broken or irritated skin. Wash hands after use. See more
